items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks durability and recovery.
items.quote: The thing about Chase Hooper is when you punch him in the face one time, he goes down. But Chase Hooper is a really good grappler. He's just got that weakness, man. He's not durable. He doesn't have good recovery.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a high-level grappler.
items.quote: But Chase Hooper is a really good grappler.

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a well-rounded fighter with skills in all areas of MMA.
items.quote: Klein's crafty. Klein's good everywhere, you know.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has shown vulnerability to being clipped in recent fights.
items.quote: We've seen Kenir clipped a lot over recent fights.

items.claim: Leroy Duncan is physically primed at age 30 compared to Jared Cannonier at 42.
items.quote: I feel like he's physically primed at 30 versus Canineer, an explosive beast at 42.

items.claim: Joey Rukat has high-level grappling skills.
Jared Cannonier possesses an incredible will to win.
items.quote: incredible will to win on Jared Cananir.
